notes: Global trade association for mobile network operators. Publishes the FS-series (Fraud and Security) standards covering mobile network security, SS7 security, roaming security, and IoT device security. Paid / members-only.

match_nodes.description: GSMA FS-series — Fraud and Security standards

data.notes: Multi-document series including FS.07 (5G security), FS.11 (SS7 security), FS.31 (Baseline Security Controls), FS.34 (Roaming security), and the IoT Security Guidelines (FS.40+).
